name: computer-use
description: Local macOS Computer Use automation with explicit user control.

interface.shortDescription: Adds gated local computer observation and input automation tools.
interface.longDescription: Provides the optional macOS backend for Omiga's first-class computer_* tools. Omiga core remains responsible for permission, audit, target validation, and stop handling.
defaultPrompt: Enable Computer Use for this task, observe the current Omiga window, and report what actions are safe to take.
